results.title: India’s Got Latent 2: Shehnaaz Gill, Elvish Yadav to Ranveer Singh, LEAKED guest list hints at Netflix’s wildest show yet
results.description: Samay Raina's back, after all that drama last season, India's Got Latent just dropped its second season on June 20, 2026. Netflix picked up the show, but you can still catch new episodes on YouTube. The guest list rumors are wild, so here's everything you need to know.

results.title: Using earbuds daily? These common habits could be damaging your hearing
results.description: Hearing loss is no longer just an age-related problem. Experts warn that everyday habits, from blasting music through earbuds to ignoring ear infections, could be silently damaging your hearing and increasing the risk of long-term health issues.

results.title: SSC CGL Application Form 2026 Last Date Today at ssc.gov.in; Check Vacancy Details and Eligibility
results.description: The Staff Selection Commission (SSC) will close the registration window for the Combined Graduate Level (CGL) Examination 2026.

results.title: Cochin Shipyard shares fall 3% amid buzz around OFS at 8% discount
results.description: Cochin Shipyard shares dipped Monday following reports of a potential government Offer for Sale (OFS) at a discount. The government, aiming to raise funds, is reportedly planning to sell a stake soon, adding to recent disinvestment activities in other public sector undertakings. Despite a recent stock decline, the company has shown strong long-term returns and improved operational efficiency in its latest earnings report.

results.title: Iran war restarts? Massive explosion rocks tUS Arab ally’s energy heartland
results.description: A massive explosion and fire at Qatar’s Barzan gas processing facility sparked speculation across social media, with dramatic images showing a large fireball and smoke rising above one of the Gulf’s most important energy hubs. Qatari authorities and QatarEnergy said the incident was caused by an industrial malfunction during operational procedures and not by hostile action. Several injuries were reported, but officials stressed there was no threat from hazardous emissions. The blast occurred at a sensitive moment as U.S.-Iran negotiations continue and regional tensions remain elevated around key energy infrastructure.

results.title: Shabana Azmi, Javed Akhtar sit hand-in-hand as Farhan Akhtar’s ‘Tum ho toh’ plays in background
results.description: Mumbai: Award-winning couple Shabana Azmi and Javed Akhtar shared a heartwarming hand-in-hand moment during a musical evening, with Farhan Akhtar’s soulful track ‘Tum Ho Toh’ from the 2008 blockbuster...

results.title: West Bengal hikes DA to 38% for state employees; 7th Pay Commission implementation in focus
results.description: Finance Minister Swapan Dasgupta announced the hike while presenting West Bengal’s first budget under the BJP-led government.

results.title: Dipika Kakar reveals her son Ruhaan is under the weather amid her immunotherapy sessions; she says, ‘He has a high fever, his behaviour has changed...’
results.description: The actress stated that her son, Ruhaan, experienced a high fever for the last two days. The abrupt shift in the home atmosphere has indirectly impacted Ruhaan's emotional state.
